task_completion.description: Log in to Rocket.Chat as admin
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat dashboard or administration panel is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the GDPR settings page
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GDPR settings section is open within the Rocket.Chat Administration panel.
The toggle or checkbox for the GDPR module is set to the 'enabled' or 'true' state.

task_completion.description: Set the Data Processing Officer Email
task_completion.visual_evidence: The input field for 'Data Processing Officer Email' or 'GDPR Contact Email' contains exactly 'privacy@rocketchat.local'.

task_completion.description: Enable the Allow Data Download feature
task_completion.visual_evidence: The toggle or checkbox for 'Allow Data Download' is set to the 'enabled' or 'true' state.
The 'Save changes' button is clicked, or a success notification is visible indicating the settings were saved.

integrity.description: Agent used the Rocket.Chat web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Settings were modified through the Rocket.Chat web UI in a browser, not via API calls or terminal scripts.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing curl commands, database queries, or scripts modifying the Rocket.Chat configuration.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the genuine application
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is interacting with the actual Rocket.Chat application, not typing the expected values into a text editor or a mock interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target GDPR enablement must be true, DPO email must be exactly 'privacy@rocketchat.local', and data download enablement must be true.
